content: I have settled up a zulip server to complement, discuss, and extend the content of the webpage Thèmes pour une harmonie on A. Grothendieck. The webpage contains letters, a particular classification of Grothendieck's works (the themes), published and unpublished works, projects of transcription, translations, and more. Get involved in a community! https://grothendieckthemes.zulipchat.com/join/kma55hxjnfm52xyy3wc3pkf7/
